name: Log Importer
description: Logs a summary of the incoming model (component counts, snapshot range) before the network is built. Passes the model through unchanged — useful as a debugging baseline for data-importer plugins.

verbose.label: Verbose logging
verbose.description: When enabled, logs each row count and the full snapshot range. When disabled, only logs a single summary line.

log_scenario.label: Log scenario params
log_scenario.description: Include carbonPrice, discountRate, and snapshotWeight in the log output.
